rationale: Add variability to key grammar rules to expose uncovered code paths.

updates.replacement:
invocation_object
    : '{'
      '\"no_input\"' ':' 'true' ','
      '\"extra_context\"' ':' extra_context_object ','
      '\"replay\"' ':' 'null' ','
      '\"overwrite_if_exists\"' ':' json_bool ','
      '\"skip_if_file_exists\"' ':' json_bool ','
      '\"accept_hooks\"' ':' json_bool ','
      '\"keep_project_on_failure\"' ':' json_bool ','
      '\"output_dir_state\"' ':' output_dir_state ','
      '\"_in_dict_var\"' ':' json_bool
      '}'
    | '{'
      '\"no_input\"' ':' 'false' ','
      '\"extra_context\"' ':' '{}' ','
      '\"replay\"' ':' replay_value ','
      '\"overwrite_if_exists\"' ':' json_bool ','
      '\"skip_if_file_exists\"' ':' json_bool ','
      '\"accept_hooks\"' ':' json_bool ','
      '\"keep_project_on_failure\"' ':' json_bool ','
      '\"output_dir_state\"' ':' output_dir_state ','
      '\"_in_dict_var\"' ':' json_bool
      '}'
    ;

prompts_object
    : '{}'
    | '{'
      '\"project_name\"' ':' STRING_LITERAL ','
      '\"use_docker\"' ':' STRING_LITERAL ','
      '\"license\"' ':' STRING_LITERAL ','
      '\"database\"' ':' STRING_LITERAL ','
      '\"type\"' ':' '\"bool\"'
      '}'
    | '{'
      '\"project_name\"' ':' STRING_LITERAL ','
      '\"owner\"' ':' STRING_LITERAL ','
      '\"type\"' ':' '\"bool\"'
      '}'
    ;

hook_script
    : 'null'
    | STRING_LITERAL
    | '"from pathlib import Path\\nPath(\'HOOK_OK\').write_text(\'ok\', encoding=\'utf-8\')\\n"'
    | '"raise SystemExit(1)\\n"'
    ;

nested_templates_value
    : 'null'
    | '[' nested_template_entry ',' nested_template_entry ']'
    | '[' nested_template_entry ',' nested_template_entry ',' nested_template_entry ']'
    ;
